nasb.text: And the wine press was trodden outside the city, and blood came out from the wine press, up to the horses’ bridles, for a distance of two hundred miles.

esv.text: And the winepress was trodden outside the city, and blood flowed from the winepress, as high as a horse’s bridle, for 1,600 stadia.

cnv.text: 那壓酒池在城外被踹踏，就有血從壓酒池流出來，漲到馬的嚼環那麼高，流到三百公里那麼遠。

ccb.text: 葡萄在城外的榨酒池中被踩踏，血从榨酒池中涌出，高至马的嚼环，流了三百公里远。

csbs.text: 榨酒池在城外被践踏，就有血从榨酒池里流出来，高到马的嚼子，远达三百公里。
